contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Outreach review-queue overhaul: own-domain inbox policy + 21 draft regenerations
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/160
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/302
  
  Details:
  Cleared the 24-day-old human-review backlog in the warm-up pipeline with a data-backed lint policy change plus bulk regeneration. Policy: the generic_inbox red flag was empirically too strict — the only email-only Partnered conversion (The Way Home Shop) and multiple genuine replies came through own-domain info@/hello@ inboxes — so generic prefixes on the shop's own website domain are now informational (auto-send eligible) while freemail/unverifiable and third-party-domain cases stay blocked. Operations: discarded all 20 drafts whose body carried the fallback shop-name bug (Gmail drafts deleted, sheet rows audited) and regenerated 21 fresh Grok-grounded drafts. Net effect on the live queue: auto-send clean tier grew 18 to 38 of 54 pending (3+ send-days of runway at the 12/day drip), human review queue shrank from 56 to 16 of which 14 are intentionally-human Hosts Circles prospects and 2 are genuinely wrong addresses. Also filed the operator-only watchdog-activation runbook (Telethon login steps + my.telegram.org code-delivery gotchas) as a durable OPEN_FOLLOWUPS entry.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
